summary: A web application (pastebin/file upload style) where users can create and share content. Currently debugging authentication issues in production — users are getting 'Unauthorized: Only logged-in users can upload files' error when attempting to upload files.
known_issues: Production upload returns 'Unauthorized: Only logged-in users can upload files' error — authentication check may be incorrectly blocking uploads or login flow is not properly integrated

existing_features.title: Fix the 'Unauthorized: Only logged-in users can upload files' error that occurs when uploading files in production. The backend authentication guard for file upload operations must correctly support both anonymous and authenticated uploads, or the frontend must ensure the actor is properly initialized with the authenticated identity before attempting uploads. Investigate whether the backend is rejecting calls due to a misconfigured principal check, and whether the frontend is passing the correct authenticated actor during the upload flow.
